examples: Spokespeople from both USPS and UPS told me all mail is important.
I am sorry about all those ridiculous euphemisms you heard from our Pentagon spokespeople.
Spokespeople for Sprint and ZTE declined to comment.
Spokespeople for JPMorgan Chase in New York could not be reached for comment on Monday morning.
Spokespeople for Rovio could not be reached for comment at the time of writing.
